summary: Tested and verified all 6 review tasks against milestone m19 DBB criteria. All 599/602 tests pass (3 OPFS browser-only skipped). Tasks completed: (1) scan() streaming verification - no changes needed, (2) cross-backend test coverage - all 5 backends × all methods verified, (3) error handling standardization - NotFoundError/IOError consistent across backends, (4) README documentation - all PRD§5 requirements met, (5) OPFSBackend consistency - stat/delete/empty-path all correct, (6) AgenticStore mtime - stored at write time, NaN edge case fixed. Wrote test-result.md for each task and updated test-coverage.json.
